title: cirsium × alpestre
intro: Cirsium × alpestre, also known as the Alpine Thistle or Mountain Thistle, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between the Cirsium heterophyllum and Cirsium alpestre plants, typically found in mountainous regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Cirsium × alpestre include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. Cirsium × alpestre can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
